tests.test_name: Submitting a multi-file batch returns 202 Accepted
tests.feature: Multi-file batch processing and email delivery
tests.description: Verifies that when a Product Owner submits multiple files for batch analysis, the system accepts the request and confirms it is being processed.

test_coverage.verification_step: Enable multi-file mode and queue two files
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user can add multiple files to a batch submission queue
The batch submission can be triggered by the user
The user receives visible confirmation that their batch is being processed

test_coverage.verification_step: Backend accepted the request with status 202
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system correctly acknowledges the batch request as accepted for async processing

tests.test_name: A multifile_batch_complete event is logged after the batch completes
tests.feature: Multi-file batch processing and email delivery
tests.description: Verifies that completing a multi-file batch submission generates a usage log event with a valid processing time, supporting analytics and monitoring.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: A minimal batch submission triggers the completion event flow

test_coverage.verification_step: A multifile_batch_complete usage log event is recorded
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system logs a completion event for auditing and usage tracking purposes

test_coverage.verification_step: The event has a positive processing_ms value
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The logged event captures a meaningful processing duration, confirming timing data is recorded

tests.test_name: Batch status card transitions to complete state after processing finishes
tests.feature: Multi-file batch processing and email delivery
tests.description: Verifies that the batch status card progresses from a processing state to a completion state and notifies the user that results have been emailed.

test_coverage.verification_step: Batch status card shown in polling state
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user can see that their batch is actively being processed after submission

test_coverage.verification_step: Wait for batch status card to show completion
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The status card updates automatically when processing finishes without requiring user action
The user is clearly informed that their results have been delivered to their email

tests.test_name: Batch status card can be dismissed after completion
tests.feature: Multi-file batch processing and email delivery
tests.description: Verifies that once batch processing is complete, the user can dismiss the status card to clean up their workspace.

test_coverage.verification_step: Wait for batch status card to show completion
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The dismiss option is only available after the batch has fully completed

test_coverage.verification_step: Click the dismiss button on the batch status card
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user can actively remove the status card from view

test_coverage.verification_step: Batch status card is not visible
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The card is fully removed from the page after dismissal, keeping the interface uncluttered
